title: Marketplace Manager - Noise Global Group - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Noise Global Group - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Noise Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Marketplace Manager at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Noise Global Group:
Noise Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Noise Global Group!
